title: Bare Bones x Redstone Torch Backport
description: A Bare Bones/Trailers Vision version of the backport of 1.21.2 (24w33a) Redstone Torch.
body:
Backport of 1.21.2 (24w33a) Redstone Torch and related blocks from [Bullfighter](https://modrinth.com/user/Bullfighter), with the Bare Bones/Trailers Vision texture!

![Image of the torches!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cdc6f83a5deb7e9634c4df93f8a19b5b40099e5c.png)
